preCompactBehavior.warn: Message injected into context, compaction proceeds. Claude asks user about /save.
preCompactBehavior.block: Compaction blocked (exit 2). User must respond before compaction can proceed.

_options.autosave: true = write _autosave.md on session end; false = skip
_options.protectedBranches: Branches that require explicit permission to push to

hooks._configResolution: Single-level config for v0.1.x. Future: multi-level with most-secure-wins.
